transcript.full_text: Alright, so in the kitchen here, the bottom left cabinet has the tea tray and some serving bowls. Moving to the right, we've got the blender and the food processor. Up top on the shelf, that's where I keep the spice rack. And over by the window, those are my herb pots.

segments.text: Alright, so in the kitchen here, the bottom left cabinet has the tea tray and some serving bowls.
Moving to the right, we've got the blender and the food processor.
Up top on the shelf, that's where I keep the spice rack.
And over by the window, those are my herb pots.
